referral.modalTitle: Bring a friend — you both get 50 Sparks!
referral.modalSubtitle: Share your personal link. When your friend joins their first mission, you both earn
referral.welcomeHook: Accept your first challenge so you and your friend both get 50 Sparks!
referral.welcomeHookSignup: We're giving you 100 Sparks to fuel your growth. Create your first mission to activate the bonus and start your journey with an advantage!
referral.notificationText: Your friend {name} accepted a challenge! You both received 50 Sparks. Keep it up!
referral.shareMessage: Join me on Ignite and let's complete missions together!

info.title: What are Sparks?
info.description: Sparks are in-game currency that helps you keep your progress on track.
info.usesTitle: What you can use them for
info.freezeDayHint: Save your streak when you miss a day
info.secondChanceHint: Recover a missed day in a mission
info.customizationHint: Extend or adjust a finished mission

rituals.freezeConfirm: Spend {cost} Sparks to freeze today for all incomplete rituals?
rituals.secondChanceConfirm: Spend {cost} Sparks to protect today's progress for this ritual?
rituals.freezeWindowError: Freeze today is only available between 22:00 and 23:59
rituals.saveYesterdayWindowError: Save yesterday streak is only available between 00:00 and 09:59
rituals.secondChanceWindowError: Second chance is only available between 22:00 and 23:59

home.description: Create, join, and conquer missions together.
home.title: Reach Your Peak in Every Mission
home.subtitle: Turn discipline into results. Launch ambitious missions and track your ascent to the top.
home.demoPreviewTitle: Experience the interface of your growth
home.quoteLine1: Discipline is the bridge between a goal and accomplishment.
home.quoteLine2: Your journey to mastery starts here.

block1.title: Life Gamification
block1.description: Earn experience (XP) and level up by completing daily rituals and epic quests.

block2.title: Teamwork
block2.description: Complete missions together with friends. Support and healthy competition are the best keys to success.

block3.title: Tactical Control
block3.description: Convenient calendar and tracking system will help you not miss any important step towards your goal.

block4.title: Visual Progress
block4.description: Watch your growth through detailed statistics and interactive achievement charts.

loggedIn.motivational: You're already closer to your goal than yesterday

emptyMissions.text: Your path is not yet defined. Click 'Start Mission' to unlock experience treasures!

dailyChecklist.title: Daily Steps
dailyChecklist.empty: Write down your first tiny action for today to start building momentum!

completionImage.title: 🎉 All Done, {name}!
completionImage.motivational: Every small step forward is a victory. Keep going!

completionDialog.title: Congratulations!
completionDialog.message: You've completed all your daily missions! Generate a victory card to celebrate.

empty.text: The rocket is ready for refueling. What shall we plan for tomorrow?

notFound.message: Looks like you've gone beyond explored space. Even great heroes sometimes need to return to base and regroup.

auth.motivationText: Thousands of heroes are already changing their lives. Start your path to discipline and mastery right now.
